title: Sterile Rehydration Synergy
description: Preparing ORS solution using well-water clarified and pre-sanitized with crushed Moringa seeds eliminates >90% of bacteria, preventing secondary fecal contamination and accelerates intestinal mucosal healing.
clinicalAdvice: Highly recommended in emergency outbreaks where sterile boiling water is unavailable. Flocculate and decant well-water with Moringa seeds first, then mix ORS.
